message: test(persist): add golden artifact tests for parse_aof_manifest [frankenredis-u3e6]

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+AofManifest {
+    base: Some(
+        AofManifestEntry {
+            file_name: "appendonly.aof.1.base.rdb",
+            file_seq: 1,
+            file_type: Base,
+        },
+    ),
+    history: [],
+    incremental: [
+        AofManifestEntry {
+            file_name: "appendonly.aof.1.incr.aof",
+            file_seq: 1,
+            file_type: Incremental,
+        },
+    ],
+    curr_base_file_seq: 1,
+    curr_incr_file_seq: 1,
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+AofManifest {
+    base: Some(
+        AofManifestEntry {
+            file_name: "appendonly.aof.2.base.rdb",
+            file_seq: 2,
+            file_type: Base,
+        },
+    ),
+    history: [
+        AofManifestEntry {
+            file_name: "appendonly.aof.1.base.rdb",
+            file_seq: 1,
+            file_type: History,
+        },
+        AofManifestEntry {
+            file_name: "appendonly.aof.1.incr.aof",
+            file_seq: 1,
+            file_type: History,
+        },
+    ],
+    incremental: [
+        AofManifestEntry {
+            file_name: "appendonly.aof.2.incr.aof",
+            file_seq: 2,
+            file_type: Incremental,
+        },
+    ],
+    curr_base_file_seq: 2,
+    curr_incr_file_seq: 2,
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+AofManifest {
+    base: Some(
+        AofManifestEntry {
+            file_name: "appendonly.aof.1.base.rdb",
+            file_seq: 1,
+            file_type: Base,
+        },
+    ),
+    history: [],

+}
